tool_args.label: Busway access rules

payload.claim_text: Buses, trucks, emergency vehicles, and Access-a-Ride are allowed to travel along the entire corridor. Local access is allowed for other vehicles, including cars, taxis, and for-hire vehicles. Vehicles access the corridor from side streets. Must leave the corridor at the next required turn, using posted signage.

tool_args.label: ACE cameras change driver behavior

payload.claim_text: Data shows that camera enforcement is successful in changing driver behavior. The number of violations decreases over time as drivers adjust to busway violations. ~80% of violators don't get a second ticket.

tool_args.label: Busway benefits for 34th Street

payload.claim_text: A Busway on 34th Street: Prioritizes truck and transit through traffic, improving bus speed and reliability. Eliminates cut-through traffic. Retains local access, parking, and loading. Enhances the pedestrian experience.

tool_args.label: 14th Street busway benefits

payload.claim_text: 14th Street Busway: Pilot launched in October 2019, in conjunction with M14A/D Select Bus Service. Bus speeds increased up to 24%. Crashes along the corridor decreased by 42%. Travel speeds for streets around the busway had minimal changes. In post-implementation surveys, participants mentioned faster, more frequent bus service; people feel safer crossing the street.
